request_text: Track the order status from the warehouse to the customer's door
rationale: Order status tracking is included by Clause 2.1.

request_text: The site should remember what someone piled into their basket last week
rationale: Paraphrase of persistent shopping-cart management, included by Clause 2.1.

request_text: Browse only the kitchenware section of the shop
rationale: Paraphrase of category filtering in the catalog, included by Clause 2.3.

request_text: Let sellers from other companies list their goods in our catalog
rationale: Third-party marketplace seller integration is excluded by Clause 6.1.

request_text: Take payments in coins that live on a blockchain
rationale: Paraphrase of cryptocurrency payment, excluded by Clause 6.1.

request_text: Show partner merchants' items in the search results
rationale: Wears product-search vocabulary (Clause 2.3) but presupposes marketplace sellers, excluded by Clause 6.1.

request_text: Offer a gift-wrap option on the order
rationale: Near the orders clause (2.1) but gift-wrapping is a deliverable no clause grants.

request_text: Customers earn loyalty points with every purchase
rationale: A loyalty program is a new capability; no clause covers it.

request_text: Add a fourth payment provider to the lineup
rationale: Clause 2.2 supports at most 3 payment providers; a fourth exceeds the contractual limit.

request_text: Integrate the bank's new card gateway
rationale: Card-payment integration falls under Clause 2.2, whose 30-hour effort pool is exhausted by the logged work items.

request_text: The category filter shows an empty page for the electronics aisle
rationale: Defect report against delivered catalog filtering (Clause 2.3); bug-fix maintenance is in scope per Clause 7.1.
Too vague to map to any clause; the copilot should escalate to the PMO rather than guess.
